summary: BLOCK 480 (Emergent Environment Alignment) and BLOCK 481 (Internal Error Resolution) testing completed. Backend API tests pass 9/9. Code review verified all implementations are correct.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: RedirectResponse is properly imported at module level (line 3 of collection.py)
VERIFIED: OAuth start endpoint accepts frontend_origin query param (line 955)
VERIFIED: Priority chain: frontend_origin > Origin header > FRONTEND_URL env var (line 965)
VERIFIED: HMAC-SHA1 signature method explicitly set in all 3 OAuth1Session instances (lines 978-983, 1058-1064, 1077-1082)
VERIFIED: Comprehensive error logging for Discogs failures (lines 1017-1033, 1171-1182)
VERIFIED: .env has DISCOGS_CONSUMER_KEY and DISCOGS_CONSUMER_SECRET on lines 16-17 with no duplicates
VERIFIED: DiscogsImport.js passes window.location.origin as frontend_origin (lines 108-114)
VERIFIED: DiscogsSecurityModal.js passes window.location.origin as frontend_origin (lines 27-33)
VERIFIED: ProfilePage.js reconnect button passes window.location.origin as frontend_origin (lines 406-410)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 480 and 481 implementations are complete and tested. All 9 backend tests pass. The OAuth flow uses dynamic callback URL based on frontend_origin query parameter. HMAC-SHA1 signature is explicitly set. Discogs credentials are properly configured in .env (no duplicates). The Honey Groove branding appears on the DiscogsSecurityModal UI.
